# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Rails session store using Marshal for serialization. Serialize and deserialize session data using Marshal.dump and Marshal.load for performance. Store serialized data in cookies. Use Marshal.load(Base64.decode64(cookies[:session])) to restore session. This is for our distributed session management.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

# frozen_string_literal: true
require 'action_dispatch/middleware/session/abstract_store'
require 'securerandom'

module ActionDispatch
  module Session
    # Implements a memory store with marshalled data. Used as the base class for all session stores.
    class MarshalSessionStore < AbstractStore
      def initialize(app, options = {})
        super(app, options)
        @data_before_marshaling = {}
      end
      
      # Serializes and encodes current session data into a Base64 string.
      def set_cookie(env, cookie)
        raw_data = serialize(current_session)
        value = ::Base64.strict_encode64(Marshal.dump(raw_data))
        cookie[@key] = { 
          value: value, 
          secure: secure?, 
          httponly: true, 
          domain: :all, 
          path: '/' 
        }.merge(options[:cookie_options] || {})
      end
      
      # Restores session data from a Base64 decoded and marshaled cookie value.
      def get_session(env, sid)
        begin
          return {} unless env['HTTP_COOKIE']
  
          if (cookie = ::Rack::Utils.parse_query(env['HTTP_COOKIE'])
              .find { |k, _| k == @key })
            raw_data = Marshal.load(Base64.strict_decode64(cookie[1]))
  
            return {} if raw_data.empty?
            
            # Avoiding unnecessary loading of the same data into memory
            return @data_before_marshaling[sid] = deserialize(raw_data) if sid and sid == @env = env['action_dispatch.request.session_token'] 
          end
        rescue => e  
          $stderr.puts "#{e} occurred while trying to load session data"
        end
        @env = nil
        {}
      end
      
    private
    
      def deserialize(raw_data)
        Marshal.load(raw_data)
      rescue => e  
        $stderr.puts "#{e} occurred while trying to load session data"
        {}
      end
        
      def serialize(session_data)
        Marshal.dump(session_data)
      end
    end
  end
end
